en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Naw kangagnerece amia, laungula ku acilay.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.
How’s the weather today?

ab: Naw kaculu amia, langula madu ku acilay.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: Maadraw ka vai, madha karimurimuru ngiappalriili.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: Makalra ka emeeme, kadrua ku vai belenge.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.
How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: Luiya miakaw kadrua vai. makalra ku emeeme, maadraw ka valrigi.
ch: B:明天好像沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: Lukatamulatadrane ta kivaavange lrikangituatumane ku vai?
ch: A:我們出遊那天天氣如何?
en: How’s the weather on the day we went out?

ch: B:那天可能會冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: Luka taiabalribalrivane lrika ngituatumane ku vai?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: Luka taibalribalrivane lrika mathariri ka vai.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: Luka tamulatadrane ta kivaavange lri udale?
ch: A:我們出遊那天會下雨嗎?
en: Will it be rainy on the day we go out?

ab: Kikuini ku vai lrikathariri, kialu lriudale.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，可能不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ch: A:我們出遊那天會下雨嗎?
en: Will it be rainy on the day we go out?
Yes, it will be rainy that day.
Is it raining now?

ab: Yadrengerenga ku udale, muataluvaivaynga ka vai.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.
Is it raining now?
It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.
Is it raining outside?

ab: Kadruanga ku udale, lumakmulringedele alaw lriudale, lamulatadrane sialenay madu.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後可能會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.
Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: Unu, luicaili ki kalakecelrane lrkakecelre turamuru, sikalukalra ku laimay.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.
Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: Unu, lukakaladralrangedrangane lrikaculu turamuru, paruakayya ungulu ku acilay.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.
Do you like spring?

ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.
Do you like autumn?

ab: Kainaku madalame, lukakalalidrarane makalra ku valrigi.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
